generated_oml:
instance PhysicalVehicle : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium"
    base:contains HokuyoLidar, IntelDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance HokuyoLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLidarPointClouds
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoLidarPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLidar
]

instance IntelDepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLidar, IntelDepthCamera
]

instance HokuyoLidarData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance IntelDepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera visual data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DetectedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DetectedObjectTracksTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted, HokuyoLidarPointClouds, IntelDepthCameraDataTransmitted, DetectedObjectTracksTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseSoftware
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN for LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance JetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel
]

instance SQLDatabaseSoftware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data monitoring (real-time visualization, data saving, report generation)"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTrackReports, DrivingPathProjections, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading of ACC system to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides CloudOffloadingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCmd, DisableACCCmd, SetDesiredSpeedCmd, EmergencyBrakingCmd
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state visualization"
]

instance ObjectTrackReports : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object track reports"
]

instance DrivingPathProjections : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Driving path projections"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data saving"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Report generation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CloudOffloadingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computation offloading to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for converting ACC control commands into physical vehicle control signals"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for converting steering angle commands into physical vehicle control signals"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and steering commands from the DT to the vehicle's motor and steering servo actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for distributed system coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity (vehicle hardware), Digital Twin Entity (cloud-hosted components), User Entity (remote UI), interconnected via ROS2 intra-vehicle and Wi-Fi inter-entity communication with Data Translation FE for protocol conversion."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for development/testing and operational phase for real-time monitoring and control, representing the 'as operated' state of the physical vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC functionality validated against ISO 15622 standards for performance class I; however, specific verification methods or error analysis not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-vehicle communication, Wi-Fi network for inter-entity communication between vehicle and cloud-hosted components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson devices onboard vehicle; Digital Twin Entity components (ACC, Data Collection) cloud-hosted; User Entity deployed on remote systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC implementation, and 3GPP 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operations (e.g., emergency braking) implemented with consideration for system safety; cybersecurity protocols not detailed."
]
